title: hieracium sabaudum subsp. occitanicum
intro: Hieracium sabaudum subsp. occitanicum, also known as the hawkweed plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the dandelion family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Hieracium sabaudum subsp. occitanicum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
